command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute 
-- Update all existing users to belong to NAH tenant
UPDATE users SET tenantId = 1 WHERE tenantId IS NULL;

-- Update all existing calls to belong to NAH tenant  
UPDATE calls SET tenantId = 1 WHERE tenantId IS NULL;

-- Update all existing team_members to belong to NAH tenant
UPDATE team_members SET tenantId = 1 WHERE tenantId IS NULL;

-- Update training materials
UPDATE training_materials SET tenantId = 1 WHERE tenantId IS NULL;

-- Verify the updates
SELECT 'users' as table_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM users WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'calls', COUNT(*) FROM calls WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'team_members', COUNT(*) FROM team_members WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'training_materials', COUNT(*) FROM training_materials WHERE tenantId = 1;
stdout:
table_name	count
users	4
team_members	3
training_materials	7
calls	73
